/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_opencl_cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_opencl_probe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_opencl_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_opencl_program.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_opencl_memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_opencl_mse_score.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_opencl_qjl_score.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_opencl_value_dequant.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_opencl_fused_attention.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_opencl_fused_attention_tiled.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_opencl_benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_driver_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_gpu_profile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_kernel_tune.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_driver_manifest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_vk_probe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tq_opencl_cli.dir/src/tq_cl_vk_interop.cpp.o -o tq_opencl_cli  /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/lib/libOpenCL.so
